execution_analysis.suggested_action: add the required supporting component or regenerate the affected component template
evidence_lines: ***** ERROR: Platform component failed phase one initialization.
***** ERROR: Initialization of simulation failed due to unhandled exception.

repair_recommendation.suggested_action: add the required supporting component or regenerate the affected component template

preconditions: apply the recommended repair at the routed stage
rerun static_checker_v1 after the repair changes the script text
rerun mission.exe only after the regenerated script passes static verification

repaired_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

platform_type acoustic_sensor_platform_basic WSF_PLATFORM
   icon surface_sensor
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0.1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor acoustic_sensor WSF_ACOUSTIC_SENSOR
      frame_time 10.0 sec
   end_sensor
end_platform_type

platform_type acoustic_target_basic WSF_PLATFORM
   icon surface_target
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 10 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform blue_sensor acoustic_sensor_platform_basic
   side blue
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor acoustic_sensor
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

platform red_target acoustic_target_basic
   side red
   route
      position 30.69n 104.11e altitude 0 m msl speed 2 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.12e altitude 0 m msl speed 2 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/acoustic_simple_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 120 sec
